profile.name: Risanth Sivarajah
profile.headline: Software Engineering Co-op student and full-stack developer
profile.availability: Seeking Software Engineering co-op opportunities for upcoming terms. Open to remote, hybrid, or relocation.

chunks.title: Ontario Tech University
chunks.text: Bachelor of Engineering (BEng), Software Engineering Co-op (Honours), Ontario Tech University, Sep 2023 to Apr 2027, Oshawa ON. Coursework includes Algorithms, Data Structures, Databases, Object-Oriented Programming, Artificial Intelligence, Software Architecture, Computer Networks, and Systems Programming.

chunks.title: SGMC Canada - Full-Stack Developer
chunks.text: At SGMC Canada (Jan 2026 to Apr 2026, Toronto ON), engineered a full-stack recruitment platform using Next.js, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL for onboarding flows, role-based access, and dashboards. Integrated Stripe payments and deployed services on AWS EC2 and S3, increasing transaction success rates by 35%. Optimized backend APIs and database queries to improve performance and scalability across workflows.

chunks.title: Solora Tech - Full-Stack Developer
chunks.text: At Solora Tech (Sep 2025 to Dec 2025, Toronto ON), developed and deployed a scalable full-stack platform using React, Node.js, and Express with a responsive production UI. Designed and optimized REST APIs and backend data flows to reduce load times and improve responsiveness. Collaborated across frontend and backend integration to deliver reliable end-to-end features.

chunks.title: LEX Marketing Inc. - Web Developer
chunks.text: At LEX Marketing Inc. (May 2025 to Aug 2025, Toronto ON), redesigned existing websites with modern UI/UX principles to improve usability and engagement. Migrated websites from Weebly to WordPress to streamline content workflows. Improved mobile responsiveness and SEO, increasing accessibility and performance across devices.

chunks.title: Brazily Fitness Inc. - Web Developer
chunks.text: At Brazily Fitness Inc. (Jan 2025 to Apr 2025, Toronto ON), built and launched a promotional website with service information and booking pathways. Improved content hierarchy and navigation flow, and strengthened technical SEO and maintainability.

chunks.title: Walmart - Stock Unloader Associate
chunks.text: At Walmart (Sep 2024 to Present, Whitby ON), supports daily store operations through freight unloading, pallet staging, and cross-department stocking. Maintains inventory accuracy through disciplined labeling and product placement. Works in a fast-paced environment with strong teamwork, time management, and safety-first execution.

chunks.title: RotateOps
chunks.text: RotateOps is a workflow automation platform built with React, Node.js, and Supabase to manage rotation-based task assignment and reduce manual coordination. Implemented REST APIs and real-time updates for synchronization reliability. Integrated Slack API to automate notifications and improve team visibility.

chunks.title: NovaPrep
chunks.text: NovaPrep is an AI-powered exam platform using React and Node.js to generate dynamic practice content and personalized study support. Built scalable REST APIs and backend services with Express. Integrated AI-driven question generation and feedback systems to improve adaptive learning and retention.

chunks.title: ForgeFit
chunks.text: ForgeFit is a cross-platform fitness app built with React Native and TypeScript for workout and nutrition tracking. Implemented authentication, storage, and data logic with Supabase. Added AI-powered nutrition insights with OpenAI API to provide personalized recommendations.

chunks.title: Technical Skills
chunks.text: Languages: C, C++, C#, Python, Java, JavaScript, SQL. Frameworks and libraries: React, Node.js, Next.js, Express, .NET, FastAPI, Flask, React Native, TypeScript. Cloud and DevOps: AWS, GCP, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD. Databases and tools: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Supabase, Firebase, Git, Jira, Postman, Power BI.

chunks.title: Contact
